title: François Villeroy de Galhau: Broadening the horizon - lessons from a decade of banking supervision
body:
Speech by Mr François Villeroy de Galhau, Governor of the Bank of France and Chair of the Prudential Supervision and Resolution Authority (ACPR), at the Conference held at the ACPR, Paris, 21 May 2026.

Source URL: https://www.bis.org/review/r260527a.htm

title: Steven Maijoor: From survival to partnership - how fintech needs the regulators, and the regulators need fintech
body:
Speech by Mr Steven Maijoor, Executive Board Member and Chair of Supervision of De Nederlandsche Bank, at the opening of the conference "Fintech meets the regulators", jointly organised by De Nederlandsche Bank and Holland Fintech Association, Amsterdam, 21 May 2026.

Source URL: https://www.bis.org/review/r260602h.htm

title: François Villeroy de Galhau: Europe and China - a key economic relationship under the pressure of great uncertainty and growing imbalances
body:
Speech by Mr François Villeroy de Galhau, Governor of the Bank of France, at the People's Bank of China, Beijing, 25 May 2026.

Source URL: https://www.bis.org/review/r260602e.htm
